compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect design fidelity validation
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md and relevant documentation to reflect the design fidelity validation workflow, config keys, and threshold calibration guidance.
**Why**: Ensures future agents understand the validation capability and how to configure it.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md updates (validation workflow, config keys design.figma_viewport and design.figma_fidelity_threshold), threshold calibration guidance, graceful degradation behavior documentation
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the validation workflow and its config keys
- When this story is complete, threshold calibration guidance explains what 85 means and how to adjust

## Considerations

- Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
